questions.instructionEn: Read the passage, then answer the question.
questions.instructionJa: 文章を読んで、質問に答えてください。
questions.questionEn: "While the initiative was praised publicly, internal reports suggested implementation had been uneven across regions." Which inference is best?
questions.questionJa: 文章: "While the initiative was praised publicly, internal reports suggested implementation had been uneven across regions." どの推論が妥当ですか？
optionsEn: Implementation succeeded equally in all regions
There is a gap between public praise and internal findings
optionsJa: 実施は全地域で同程度に成功した
公的評価と内部評価にギャップがある
この施策はすでに終了している

questions.instructionEn: Read the passage, then answer the question.
questions.instructionJa: 文章を読んで、質問に答えてください。
questions.questionEn: "Early metrics looked strong, but field teams reported conflicting priorities (passage 2)." Which inference is best?
questions.questionJa: 「初期の指標は良好に見えたが、現場チームは優先事項の食い違いを報告した（短文2）。」最も適切な推論はどれですか。
optionsEn: Initial results were promising, but implementation may have lacked alignment
The program ended soon after the first review
The program was equally successful in every location
optionsJa: 初期の結果は有望だったが、実施には足並みの乱れがあった可能性がある
その施策は最初の見直しの直後に終了した
その施策はすべての地域で同じように成功した

questions.instructionEn: Read the passage, then answer the question.
questions.instructionJa: 文章を読んで、質問に答えてください。
questions.questionEn: "Stakeholders celebrated milestones while audits flagged gaps in documentation (passage 3)." Which inference is best?
questions.questionJa: 「関係者は節目の達成を祝った一方で、監査では文書の不備が指摘された（短文3）。」最も適切な推論はどれですか。
optionsEn: The project showed visible progress, but some internal processes were weak
The program ended before the audits were completed
Results varied mainly because of regional differences
optionsJa: そのプロジェクトは目に見える進展を示したが、内部手続きの一部は不十分だった
その施策は監査が完了する前に終了した
結果は主に地域差によって異なっていた

optionsJa: 全地域で同程度に成功

questions.questionEn: The customer is complaining about conflicting answers from different agents. Which reply is best?
questions.questionJa: 次の内容の苦情: 担当者ごとに回答が食い違う件。どの返信が最も適切ですか？
optionsEn: I understand the inconvenience. I'll investigate and update you by 3 p.m. with next steps.
optionsJa: I understand the inconvenience. I'll investigate and update you by 3 p.m. with next steps.
